rationale: NAND is defined by the equivalence phi NAND psi == not(phi and psi), so the load-bearing semantic relation is def:logical-equivalence (the ==), which was missing. Added, matching the chapter convention that ==-bearing statements cite def:logical-equivalence (cf. the algebra laws 0003-0009 and def:connective-reduction 0060 just below).
notes: def:truth-assignment is kept but flagged: it sits one level below def:logical-equivalence (which is defined via truth assignments / identical truth-table columns), so it is the transitive dep, not the direct one. Reviewer may replace truth-assignment with logical-equivalence rather than keep both.
